violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy refrigeration unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The wall in the back storage area by the stairs has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2026

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC informed to increase PCS services. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dry storage shelving (ensure) have an accumulation of rodent droppings and refrigerator shelving have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025

Empty boxes were observed in the mop sink. Mop sinks must be accessible for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
